content.text:
Hi — I'm the Northwind Analytics Agent. I analyze Northwind Traders sales data (orders, products, customers, employees, suppliers) and create charts/reports like dashboards, sales-by-category, top products, customer segmentation, and year‑over‑year comparisons for 2024–2025.

How can I help right now? Examples:
- "Show the Dashboard for 2025"
- "Top 10 customers by revenue this year"
- "Compare sales by category 2024 vs 2025"

Tell me which view or year you'd like to see.
